texto: We are always growing up. I'm growing up as I type this. An eighty-seven-year-old woman is still technically growing up. So be as immature as you want. Right now, you are the youngest you you're ever going to be.
explicacao: Citação de Mamrie Hart sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “We are always growing up. I'm growing up as I type this. An eighty-seven-year-old woman is still …” articula reflexao, growing-up, growing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
